item.name: Big Shell Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a shrill tone that is said to summon a big shell, and presumably some sort of creature inside said shell.

mount.name: Big Shell
mount.action: Summon forth your big shell mount, which is ironically rather small. Still quite big for a crab, though.
mount.description: Raised by a Qiqirn culinary connoisseur, this carefree crustacean formed a bond of friendship with its keeper, and in so doing, escaped the cookpot. Though it may not be the most obvious choice for a mount, its smooth, round shell makes it one of the more comfortable.
mount.tooltip:
Big shells are so named for
the bigness of their shells,
which they wear most bigly.
Clever, yes?
- Qiqirn Naturalist
